title: phyllanthus obtusatus
intro: Phyllanthus obtusatus, also known as the small-leaved phyllanthus or green gold, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, characterized by its small, oval-shaped leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties. Phyllanthus obtusatus has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating liver and kidney diseases, and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or extracts to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
